name: super-loop-mcp
description: Local-first Sling supervisor/harness for evidence-gated agent loops. Holds the full private Strip Miner + Loop-de-loop inside the server, streams them phase-gated, owns the lane/target queue + transitions + stop policy, blocks spoofed human review, and blocks any promotion lacking a frozen benchmark plus tool-measured reverified frontier movement. Reactive MCP front-end + an autonomous driver (scripts/run-campaign.mjs) that drives the campaign itself. The operator is the only stop condition.
